node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria E Tétano Adulto
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Adult Diphtheria And Tetanus Adsorbed Vaccine

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria E Tétano Infantil
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria And Tetanus Adsorbed Vaccine For Children

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano E Pertussis
Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano E Pertussis (Acelular)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis Vaccine (Adsorbed)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano E Pertussis (Acelular) Adulto
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Adult Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis Vaccine (Adsorbed)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis (Acelular) E Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis (Adsorbed) And Haemophilus Influenzae B Vaccines (Conjugated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis (Acelular), Hepatite B (Recombinante) E Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis (Adsorbed), Hepatitis B (Recombinant) And Haemophilus Influenzae B Vaccines (Conjugated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis (Acelular), Hepatite B (Recombinante) E Poliomielite 1, 2, 3 (Inativada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis (Adsorbed), Hepatitis B (Recombinant) And Poliovirus 1,2,3 Vaccines (Inactivated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis (Acelular), Hepatite B (Recombinante), Poliomielite 1, 2 E 3 (Inativada) E Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis (Adsorbed), Hepatitis B (Recombinant) And Poliovirus 1,2,3 (Inactivated) And Haemophilus Influenzae B Vaccines(Conjugated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis (Acelular), Poliomielite 1, 2 E 3 (Inativada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis (Adsorbed) And Poliovirus 1,2,3 Vaccine

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis (Acelular), Poliomielite 1, 2 E 3 (Inativada) E Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Acellular Pertussis (Adsorbed), Poliovirus 1,2,3 And Haemophilus Influenzae B Vaccines (Conjugated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis E Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Pertussis (Adsorbed) And Haemophilus Influenzae B Vaccines (Conjugated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis E Hepatite B (Recombinante)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Pertussis (Adsorbed) And Hepatitis B (Recombinant) Vaccine

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Difteria, Tétano, Pertussis, Hepatite B (Recombinante) E Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Diphtheria, Tetanus And Pertussis (Adsorbed), Hepatitis B (Recombinant) And Haemophilus Influenzae B Vaccines (Conjugated)

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Adsorvida Hepatite A E Hepatite B (Recombinante)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Adsorbed Hepatitis A And Hepatitis B Vaccines (Recombinant)
Tetravalent Live Attenuated Dengue Virus Vaccine
Tetravalent Live Attenuated Dengue Virus Vaccine (Recombinant)
Salmonella Typhi Vi Polysaccharide Conjugate Vaccine

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Haemophilus Influenzae B (Conjugada) E Meningocócica C (Conjugada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Haemophilus Influenzae Type B Conjugate Vaccine (Meningococcal Protein Conjugate)
Adjuvanted Inactivated Subunity Monovalent Influenza Vaccine
Adjuvanted Inactivated Subunity Tetravalent Influenza Vaccine
Adjuvanted Inactivated Subunity Trivalent Influenza Vaccine
Human Papillomavirus Bivalent (Types 16 And 18) Vaccine, Recombinant
Live Attenuated Human G1P[8] Rotavirus Vaccine

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Rotavírus Humano/Bovino G1, G2, G3, G4 E G9 (Atenuada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Live Attenuated Human-Bovine G1,G2, G3,G4 And G9 Reassortant Rotavirus Vaccine

node.nomenclaturadcboriginal: Vacina Rotavírus Humano/Bovino G1, G2, G3, G4 E P1A[8] (Atenuada)
node.nomenclaturadciinn: Live Attenuated Human-Bovine G1,G2, G3,G4 And P1A[8] Reassortant Rotavirus Vaccine
